name: First Global Data Limited
summary: First Global Data Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides electronic payments and transaction processing solutions. Its services include remittance of services (online and mobile) from Canada and the United States under the FirstGlobalMoney brand; digital payments (online and mobile) under the PayQwik brand; and the licensing of its software. It primarily serves expatriates and migrant workers in Canada and the United States who send money to their countries of origin; and individuals without traditional banking relationships and traditional bank customers who prefer the speedy mobile and online service. The company accepts funds primarily from customers in Canada and the United States at its storefronts and online through electronic funds transfer and checking services. It dispenses funds to through its third-party agent and partner network to approximately 70 countries worldwide. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
